name: Raisin Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the raisins and apple juice. Bring to a boil and cool.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together the flour, baking soda, baking powder, cinnamon, nutmeg, cloves, egg, and vegetable oil until well combined.
3. Add the cooled raisin mixture to the flour mixture and stir thoroughly.
4. Pour the batter into a lightly-oiled 8-inch-square pan.
5. Sprinkle the grated orange rind evenly over the top of the batter.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 to 40 minutes, or until set.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack. Once cooled, cut into bars.
8. Makes approximately 16 bars. One Bar = Calories: 76, Carbohydrates: 14, Protein: 2, Fat: 2, Sodium: 47, Potassium: 109, Cholesterol: 17
9. Exchange Value: 1 Bread Exchange
